summary: Enthusiastic fan praise marks this release as a blissful listening experience, though technical details about the source are unavailable.
review: Both reviewers award five stars and speak of “complete bliss” and gratitude to those who captured the performance, indicating strong overall enjoyment. No specific comments on soundboard versus audience or mix clarity are provided, so the recording quality remains unknown beyond the high enthusiasm expressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Two five‑star reviews show strong positive sentiment, but they contain no concrete details on performance or audio quality, limiting confidence in the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity, mix, or source type; reviewers’ high praise suggests a generally satisfying listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific remarks on set structure or individual songs were provided.
